title: tragacantha utrigera
intro: Tragacantha utrigera, also known as Sarcocornia utriculata, is a type of succulent shrub native to coastal areas of Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha utrigera include treating wounds, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha utrigera can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
